summary: Backend testing of Meta Graph API integration for direct Facebook/Instagram sharing. All 12 tests passed. Endpoints tested: GET /api/meta/oauth-url, GET /api/meta/status, DELETE /api/meta/disconnect, POST /api/meta/share-to-facebook, POST /api/meta/share-to-instagram, GET /api/meta/callback.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper error handling for all endpoints
OAuth flow correctly implements long-lived token exchange for 60-day validity
Instagram Content Publishing API correctly implements 2-step flow (container creation + publish)
Video/Reels support includes proper polling for processing status
Note: Actual Meta OAuth flow requires user interaction and cannot be fully automated in tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meta Graph API integration backend endpoints all working correctly. Tests verify: 1) OAuth URL generation with correct scopes (pages_manage_posts, instagram_content_publish, etc.), 2) Status endpoint returns proper MetaAccountInfo structure, 3) Disconnect endpoint clears meta_connections, 4) Share endpoints return appropriate 400 errors when not connected. Note: Full OAuth flow requires actual user interaction with Facebook login - cannot be automated. The meta_connections field in Profile model stores JSON with access_token, pages, and instagram_accounts.

endpoints_tested.GET /api/meta/oauth-url: PASS - Returns valid OAuth URL with correct scopes and app ID
endpoints_tested.GET /api/meta/status: PASS - Returns MetaAccountInfo with facebook_connected, instagram_connected, pages
endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/meta/disconnect: PASS - Clears meta_connections and returns success
endpoints_tested.POST /api/meta/share-to-facebook: PASS - Returns 400 when not connected (expected behavior)
endpoints_tested.POST /api/meta/share-to-instagram: PASS - Returns 400 when not connected (expected behavior)
endpoints_tested.GET /api/meta/callback: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid OAuth code (expected behavior)

integration_notes.instagram_posting: Requires Instagram Business account linked to Facebook Page

mocked_apis.Meta Graph API: NOT MOCKED - Real integration, but OAuth flow requires user interaction
